lines.speaker: Davon
lines.text: Pssst! Come here if you want to do some amulet trading.

lines.speaker: Davon
lines.text: Errr, I was...I was clearing my throat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you ever restock some types of amulets?

lines.speaker: Davon
lines.text: Some of these amulets are very hard to get. I have to wait until an adventurer supplies me.
